content: *도구, 일반* {color="gray"} --- **무게:** 8 lbs **가치:** 50 GP --- **능력:** 지능 {color="red"} **활용:** 물질 식별 (DC 15), 불 피우기 (DC 15) {color="red"} **제작:** [산성 용액](/212f7f5a1e8081908c1be51837f7ee31?pvs=25), [연금술사의 불](/212f7f5a1e80814e8face9a47cf9fe29?pvs=25), [구성요소 주머니](/212f7f5a1e8081f19393c6421b587222?pvs=25), [기름](/212f7f5a1e8081959762fb1471be0875?pvs=25), [종이](/212f7f5a1e8081e6af2af37c2a7cb209?pvs=25), [향수](/212f7f5a1e8081c6b2b2f299053d87ca?pvs=25) {color="red"}
